title: cenchrus × cupreus
intro: Cenchrus × cupreus, also known as Pearl Millet, is a hybrid crop species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus × cupreus include reducing oxidative stress, improving blood sugar control, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Cenchrus × cupreus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
